Dirty Birds
Hatari Lodge · 504 Peerless Dr, Breckenridge CO 80424
June 11–13
Colorado
Day 1
Thursday, June 11
Costco stop then Whole Foods on the way up. See the Grocery tab for the full list.
10:34 AM – 10:47 AM
Brendan + Charlie Land — Pick Up Rental Together
Brendan lands 10:34 AM, Charlie lands 10:47 AM (Delta). They meet up at the terminal and pick up the rental car together, then head straight to Costco.
~11:00 AM
Costco Stop — Brendan + Charlie
Beers, booze, drinks, snacks, non-perishables. Then back to DEN to grab Craigwell + Jeff.
11:24 AM
Craigwell Lands — American
Brendan + Charlie swing back to pick up from American terminal.
12:16 PM
Jeff Lands — United (UA 347)
Full car assembled. Brendan, Charlie, Craigwell, Jeff — heading to Whole Foods Frisco then Breck.
~1:30 PM
Lunch Stop Option
Either stop in Denver or hit Main Street Restaurant in Idaho Springs — right off I-70. Closes at 2:30, ~45 min from Denver.
📍 Idaho Springs
~2:30 PM
Whole Foods Stop — Frisco, CO
Fresh items for breakfast, Thursday dinner, Saturday dinner, and frozen pizzas.
📍 Whole Foods Frisco
5:55 PM
Miika + Flo Land — United (UA 2297)
Flo picks up rental. Grom lands right after at ~6:00 PM. All three regroup at DEN, load up, and head to Breck — grabbing dinner on the road.
11:00 PM
Welch Arrives
Driving solo in his own car. Late arrival — don't wait up.
Evening
Dinner at the House
Burgers, fries, all the fixings. Brendan's car (Brendan, Charlie, Craigwell, Jeff) eats at the house. Flo's car (Flo, Miika, Grom) grabs dinner on the road — they're rolling in later. Welch arrives ~11 PM.
🏠 504 Peerless Dr, Breckenridge CO 80424
Day 2
Friday, June 12
Until 10:00 AM
Breakfast at the House
Bacon, egg & cheese sandwiches + coffee. Eat up, ease in.
10:00 AM — Lunch
Morning Adventure
Choose Your Own
🍄 Shrooms + explore the mountains
Head out into the mountains and let the day unfold.
🚡 Gondola + McCullough Gulch Hike
Take the gondola up, then hike McCullough Gulch — a stunning alpine valley trail with waterfalls and a high-altitude lake. ~4 mi out-and-back, moderate difficulty.
🏔 Explore Downtown Breck
Wander Main Street, grab coffee, poke around town.
🚡 Gondola 🥾 McCullough Gulch 🏔 Downtown Breck
~12:30 PM
Lunch Together
Regroup downtown Breckenridge. Full crew.
📍 Downtown Breck
Afternoon
Afternoon Adventure Optional
Choose Your Own
🥏 Disc Golf at Peak One — Frisco
Peak One Disc Golf Course in Frisco — scenic 18-hole course, ~15 min from Breck.
🍺 Stay in town — drink + explore Main Street more
Hit the Breckenridge Distillery or Broken Compass Brewing before the night kicks off.
🥏 Peak One Disc Golf 🥃 Breck Distillery 🍺 Broken Compass
7:00 PM
Night Out
Head into town. Put names down at Blue Stag Saloon, drinks on the patio while you wait, then party downtown. Main Street has tons of options — pick your own adventure once you're out.
🍺 Blue Stag Saloon 🤠 Horseshoe Breck
Also an option
Kenosha looks cool — great patio vibe. Plenty more on Main Street, figure it out once you're there.
🥩 Kenosha 🗺 Main Street Bars
Day 3
Saturday, June 13
Big day. Early start. Breakfast on the road — grab coffee + food at Breakfast Deli Frisco on the way out.
8:00 AM
Depart for Glenwood Springs
~1.5 hr drive. Swing through Breakfast Deli Frisco on the way — grab-and-go breakfast burritos. They make them fresh daily.
🌯 Burrito Menu — Order Ahead: (970) 668-9255
Chorizo Burrito — chorizo, eggs, potatoes, cheese, green chili
Bacon & Egg Burrito — bacon, scrambled eggs, cheese, green chili
Sausage Burrito — sausage, eggs, potatoes, cheese
Veggie Burrito — eggs, potatoes, peppers, cheese, green chili
☕ Breakfast Deli Frisco
10:00 AM
Skeet Shooting
Bair Ranch, Glenwood Springs.
🎯 Bair Ranch
~12:00 PM
Lunch — Glenwood Springs
CO Ranch House first. If there's a wait, grab food from Slope & Hatch and bring it to Casey's Brewing.
🥩 CO Ranch House 🌮 Slope & Hatch 🍺 Casey's Brewing
2:30 PM
Whitewater Rafting 🌊
Class III Rapids — Glenwood Springs. Main event of the weekend.
📍 Adventure Outdoors
4:30 PM
Drive Back to Breck
~1.5 hrs. Decompress on the drive.
🗺 Directions to Hatari Lodge
Evening
Big House Dinner + House Party
Steaks, salmon, baked potato, grilled corn. Cook together, decompress, last night vibes.
Shopping List

Hit Costco first (near DEN), then Whole Foods on the way to Breck. Brendan's car handles both stops Thursday morning.
